global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent offer and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial tracking service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A soft, rounded rectangle with a light green background, providing a subtle backdrop for the text.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Track every euro No hidden fees', centrally positioned and easy to read.
elements.text_content: Track every euro No hidden fees

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: The logo 'CoinBridge' appears at the top in a modern, sans-serif font, colored in white against the green background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Get offer' in white, set against a contrasting background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with soft colors, CoinBridge, financial tracking service
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main offer text is centered, and the CTA button is at the bottom.
